children.text: the total of the amounts authorized to be appropriated for the purpose of carrying out , for the payment of grants and loans under , for the acquisition of property under , and for carrying out any transportation program and any educational and cultural program described in shall not exceed $33,600,000.1section 410cc–32(b)(2) of this titlesection 410cc–33 of this titlesection 410cc–34 of this titlesection 410cc–32(c) of this titleSo in original. There is no par. (2).1

children.heading: Commencement date
children.label: b Commencement date
children.text: No funds shall be authorized pursuant to this section prior to .October 1, 1978

children.heading: Availability of appropriations
children.label: c Availability of appropriations
children.text: Funds appropriated under subsection (a) of this section shall remain available until expended.

children.heading: Aggregate amount of money expended; certifying statement to Congress as limiting availability of appropriated amounts
children.label: d Aggregate amount of money expended; certifying statement to Congress as limiting availability of appropriated amounts

children.text: Within 60 days after , and on each subsequent October 1 and March 1, the Secretary shall submit to the Congress a statement certifying the aggregate amount of money expended by the Commonwealth of Massachusetts, the city of Lowell, and by any nonprofit entity for activities in the city of Lowell consistent with the purpose of this subchapter during the period beginning on , and ending on the date such statement is submitted.June 5, 1978January 1, 1974

The aggregate amount of funds made available by the Secretary to the Commission from funds appropriated under subsection (a)(2) of this section may not exceed the amount certified by the Secretary in the most recent statement submitted to the Congress under paragraph (1) of this subsection.
